plan.text:
Wire intrabar exit pricing through the full stack so replay uses bar high/low to detect TP/SL breaches within candles, exiting at the exact limit price instead of bar close.

Phase 1: Add positionBars to TickInput, wire barHigh/barLow through tick() into ExitContext, use exitPrice for P&L.
Phase 2: Build positionBars in replay machine using getPosBarAt(), pass to tick().
Phase 3: Add intrabar tests to strategy-engine.test.ts.
Phase 4: Run April 2 validation replay comparing close vs intrabar.
